tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.getForecastResultJobId
tools.description: Get result for forecast job

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.getForecastStatusJobId
tools.description: Get status for forecast job

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecast
tools.description: To support maximum operation and integration speed, this endpoint only returns the calculated forecast.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastAi
tools.description: Forecast AI is utilizing advanced machine learning models. Please be mindful of enhanced execution times (~1-2s per timeseries).

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastAiHistoryAndForecast
tools.description: History and forecast utilizing advanced machine learning models. Please be mindful of enhanced execution times (~1-2s per timeseries).

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastFileToForecast
tools.description: Forecast from file allows for quick analysis via Microsoft Excel and CSV file format. Please check documentation link for help.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastForecastBottomUp
tools.description: Calculate forecast by timeseries and sum results up to establish forecast for top level timeseries.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastForecastTopDown
tools.description: Calculate forecast based on sum of of lower level timeseries and distribute forecast down based on ratios. Great feature for planning levels with dynamic timeseries.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastFullDetail
tools.description: Response provides full forecast result details, including error, trend seasonality and outlier. Great for advanced analysis.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastHistoryAndForecast
tools.description: Reponse provides history and forecast per timeseries. Great for visualizing results.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastOptimalParameter
tools.description: Use the optimal parameter sets created by iCUE to set the method parameters of your internal planning system.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postForecastRerun
tools.description: Rerun previously uploaded planning level.

tools.name: insightDrivenPlanningForecastOptimization.postOutlier
tools.description: Identify outliers (single and repetitive spikes, seasonality, masked outliers, trend and level jumps, amongst other topics) and use for cleansing of the history stream prior to forecast claculation. Depending on math model used, this approach often improves results dramatically, as it removes disturbances.

tools.name: portfolioPerformanceManagement.postPortfolio
tools.description: Calculate and retrieve results of ABC (pareto analysis) and xyz (Coefficient of variation) per timeseries and planning level. This analysis is a powerful means to estbalish a proper planning cadence, best accuracy messures and optimal hyperparameters for the organization. It provides a balanced and actionable overview of the entire product portfolio.

tools.name: portfolioPerformanceManagement.postPortfolioAbc
tools.description: Calculate and retrieve results of ABC (pareto analysis) per timeseries and planning level.

tools.name: portfolioPerformanceManagement.postPortfolioFileToPortfolio
tools.description: Calculate and retrieve results of ABC (pareto analysis) and xyz (Coefficient of variation) per timeseries and planning level. This analysis is a powerful means to estbalish a proper planning cadence, best accuracy messures and optimal hyperparameters for the organization. It provides a balanced and actionable overview of the entire product portfolio.
